rules.apiUniverse: Uses latest de-duplicated API records from docs/api-reference/api-inventory.json.
rules.cliCoverage: Matches CLI SDK service calls and direct CLI httpClient calls to latest APIs by HTTP method and normalized endpoint path.
rules.directHttp: Direct CLI httpClient calls are counted as CLI usage, but are kept distinguishable from SDK service calls.
rules.unmatched: CLI usages that resolve to SDK/raw endpoints outside the latest API universe are reported as legacy or extra usages.
